font_rules.microcopy: JetBrains Mono, uppercase or numbers (e.g., Nº 04, MMXXVI)

spacing_and_layout.shadows: Warm amber shadows. No neutral gray. e.g. shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgba(192,130,97,0.15)]
spacing_and_layout.layout_style: Editorial magazine layout, asymmetrical or left-aligned, generous whitespace. Never standard centered SaaS layout.

interactions_and_motion.hover_state: text color changes to #C08261 (terracota), cards translateY(-4px)
interactions_and_motion.animations: Breath-like transitions using cubic-bezier(0.36, 0.07, 0.19, 0.97). 6s breath animation for candle flame elements.
interactions_and_motion.effects: Paper noise texture overlay on the body. Candle glow radial gradients (warm amber/terracota) as hero atmosphere. NO glassmorphism. NO purple gradients.

content_guidelines.tone: Editorial, contemplative, silent. No exclamation marks, no 'compre agora'. Em-dash (—), mid-dot (·), ampersand (&) highly encouraged.
content_guidelines.icons: NO emojis. Use Lucide with stroke-width 1.25 only for essential UI (cart, search, menu). Use brand monogram as the single symbolic icon.

hero_atmosphere.description: A lit candle sitting on top of a wooden shelf, warm dark library aesthetic.

collection_cedro_tabaco.description: Gin & Tonic candle on a book.

collection_jardim_monastico.description: Lit candle in a decorative bowl with red/warm accents.

collection_luz_tempo.description: Table with a vase of flowers and a warm candle on it.

sobre_processo.description: Brown books closeup photography, warm lighting.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Google Fonts: 'Cinzel Decorative', 'Montserrat', 'Great Vibes', 'JetBrains Mono'.
Construct the site in pure React/Tailwind. Do NOT use Shadcn cards or buttons if they enforce border-radius. Everything must be radius 0.
Implement the 'Coleções' as a fictional editorial grid with the images provided (Cedro & Tabaco, Luz & Tempo, Jardim Monástico).
Ensure all backgrounds use the #F9F6F0 (Cera) color, except where you deliberately use a dark block (in which case text should be light).
Use a soft noise overlay (`mix-blend-mode: multiply; opacity: 0.05`) to simulate organic paper texture.
Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements for robust automated testing.
